name: Carmelized Carnitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place pork cubes in a single layer in a 10-inch skillet.
3. Top with remaining ingredients except green onion.
4. Heat to boiling, then reduce heat.
5. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally until the water has evaporated and the pork is slightly caramelized, about 35 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with green onion and serve with wooden picks.
